subject: URGENT: production is down
body: Our whole dashboard is showing a 500 error and the API is down. This is an outage and it is unacceptable, we need this fixed asap.

subject: Question about my invoice
body: I think I was double charged on my last subscription payment. Can someone check the billing on my account and issue a refund if needed?

subject: Small feature idea, no rush
body: Whenever you get a chance, it would be nice to have a dark mode. Low priority, no hurry at all.

subject: Can't log in - password reset not working
body: I tried to reset my password but my account seems locked and I have no access. Please help me regain login access.

subject: Interested in a demo
body: We are evaluating tools and would like a demo and a quote to upgrade to a bigger plan. Thanks!

subject: URGENT: production is down (update)
body: Still an outage. The API is down and customers are angry. We need this fixed immediately.

subject: Ticket with no id and no timestamp
body: This row is malformed and the pipeline must skip it safely.
